calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2025 Off Calendar

Motion And Motion For Default Judgment/Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:36 am and concluding at 9:40 am.

Plaintiff Rod Divelbiss is present in pro per, placed under and oath via zoom video conference.
Defendants Nir Maman and CT707Isreali Krav Systems, INC. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court takes Judicial Notice of the complaint and right to arbitrate.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, and against Defendant Nir Maman and CT707Isreali Krav Systems, INC., as follows:

1. Damages: $59,997.32
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $918.85
4. Attorney fees: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $60,916.17

Proposed judgment signed and filed.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.(D505)

Motion And Motion For Default Judgment/Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Continued To Feb-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
